description.en: OpenAI’s previous flagship reasoning model for coding, agentic tasks, and broad professional work.
description.zh-TW: OpenAI 先前的旗艦推理模型，適合 coding、agent 任務與廣泛專業工作。

strengths.en: Strong coding and tool-use baseline with broad ecosystem support.
strengths.zh-TW: coding 與工具使用基線強，且生態支援廣。

strengths.en: Large context and mature Responses API integration.
strengths.zh-TW: 上下文大，且 Responses API 整合成熟。

caveats.en: No longer OpenAI’s newest flagship tier.
caveats.zh-TW: 已不是 OpenAI 最新旗艦層級。

caveats.en: Costs rise quickly on long, high-output workflows.
caveats.zh-TW: 長上下文與高輸出工作流成本會快速上升。

sourceRefs.label: GPT-5 VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: OpenAI’s previous flagship reasoning model for coding, agentic tasks, and broad professional work.
summary.zh-TW: OpenAI 先前的旗艦推理模型，適合 coding、agent 任務與廣泛專業工作。

description.en: A lower-cost GPT-5 variant tuned for low-latency, high-volume workloads.
description.zh-TW: 較低成本的 GPT-5 變體，適合低延遲與高吞吐工作負載。

strengths.en: Good balance of price, latency, and tool-use support.
strengths.zh-TW: 價格、延遲與工具支援之間的平衡不錯。

strengths.en: Useful default for production agent loops that do not need frontier reasoning every turn.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合作為不需要每輪都用前沿推理的 production agent 預設。

caveats.en: Not the best choice for the hardest reasoning tasks.
caveats.zh-TW: 對最難的推理任務不是最佳選擇。

caveats.en: Still more expensive than ultra-cheap routing tiers.
caveats.zh-TW: 仍比超低價 routing 層更貴。

sourceRefs.label: GPT-5 mini VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: A lower-cost GPT-5 variant tuned for low-latency, high-volume workloads.
summary.zh-TW: 較低成本的 GPT-5 變體，適合低延遲與高吞吐工作負載。

description.en: The fastest and cheapest GPT-5 tier for summarization, classification, and simple automation.
description.zh-TW: 速度最快、成本最低的 GPT-5 層級，適合摘要、分類與簡單自動化。

strengths.en: Very strong cost profile for routing, triage, and pre-processing.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合拿來做 routing、分類與前處理。

strengths.en: Maintains built-in tool support despite the low price tier.
strengths.zh-TW: 即使在低價位仍保留內建工具支援。

caveats.en: Capability ceiling is lower for nuanced coding or planning.
caveats.zh-TW: 在細緻 coding 或規劃任務上的能力上限較低。

caveats.en: Best used as part of a routed stack rather than as the only model.
caveats.zh-TW: 更適合放在 routed stack 裡，而不是單獨承擔全部工作。

sourceRefs.label: GPT-5 nano VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: The fastest and cheapest GPT-5 tier for summarization, classification, and simple automation.
summary.zh-TW: 速度最快、成本最低的 GPT-5 層級，適合摘要、分類與簡單自動化。

description.en: A cost-efficient realtime model for voice and streaming interactions over WebRTC, WebSocket, or SIP.
description.zh-TW: 面向語音與串流互動的高性價比 realtime 模型，可走 WebRTC、WebSocket 或 SIP。

pricing.notes: OpenAI lists separate audio pricing on the API pricing page.

strengths.en: Low-latency audio and text interaction is the main strength.
strengths.zh-TW: 低延遲音訊與文字互動是最大優勢。

strengths.en: Useful when UX speed matters more than deep long-form reasoning.
strengths.zh-TW: 當 UX 速度比長篇深度推理更重要時很有價值。

caveats.en: Smaller context and output limits than general frontier text models.
caveats.zh-TW: 上下文與輸出上限都小於通用前沿文字模型。

caveats.en: Not the right default for research-heavy or long-document tasks.
caveats.zh-TW: 不適合作為研究型或長文件任務的預設模型。

sourceRefs.label: gpt-realtime-mini VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: A cost-efficient realtime model for voice and streaming interactions over WebRTC, WebSocket, or SIP.
summary.zh-TW: 面向語音與串流互動的高性價比 realtime 模型，可走 WebRTC、WebSocket 或 SIP。

description.en: OpenAI’s lower-cost image generation tier for high-volume image workflows.
description.zh-TW: OpenAI 較低成本的圖像生成層，適合高吞吐影像工作流。

pricing.input: $2 / 1M text input tokens or $2.50 / 1M image input tokens
pricing.notes: OpenAI also publishes per-image generation prices by size and quality.

strengths.en: Lower-cost image generation option from the same OpenAI stack.
strengths.zh-TW: 可在同一 OpenAI stack 中使用的低成本圖像生成選項。

strengths.en: Useful when teams want simpler procurement and vendor consolidation.
strengths.zh-TW: 適合想簡化採購與供應商整合的團隊。

caveats.en: Not a general text model and should not be compared like one.
caveats.zh-TW: 不是通用文字模型，不該用同樣方式比較。

caveats.en: Official docs emphasize pricing more than broader capability detail.
caveats.zh-TW: 官方頁面更偏重價格資訊，而不是更完整的能力說明。

sourceRefs.label: gpt-image-1-mini VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: OpenAI’s lower-cost image generation tier for high-volume image workflows.
summary.zh-TW: OpenAI 較低成本的圖像生成層，適合高吞吐影像工作流。

description.en: Anthropic’s highest-capability Claude tier for difficult reasoning, long-form synthesis, and premium agent work.
description.zh-TW: Anthropic 最高能力的 Claude 層級，適合高難度推理、長篇整合與高價值 agent 工作。

strengths.en: Top-tier reasoning and synthesis for hard tasks.
strengths.zh-TW: 在高難度任務上的推理與整合能力屬第一梯隊。

strengths.en: Strong fit for premium research and coding workflows.
strengths.zh-TW: 很適合高價值研究與 coding 工作流。

caveats.en: Premium pricing makes cost control important.
caveats.zh-TW: 價格偏高，必須重視成本控制。

caveats.en: Often better reserved for escalation rather than every request.
caveats.zh-TW: 更適合作為升級路由，而不是每個請求都直接使用。

sourceRefs.label: Claude Opus 4.6 VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Anthropic’s highest-capability Claude tier for difficult reasoning, long-form synthesis, and premium agent work.
summary.zh-TW: Anthropic 最高能力的 Claude 層級，適合高難度推理、長篇整合與高價值 agent 工作。

description.en: Anthropic’s balanced Claude tier for broad production use, coding, and agent orchestration.
description.zh-TW: Anthropic 較均衡的 Claude 層級，適合廣泛 production、coding 與 agent 編排。

strengths.en: One of the strongest default choices for practical coding and agent work.
strengths.zh-TW: 是實務 coding 與 agent 工作很強的預設選擇之一。

strengths.en: Better price-performance than the premium Opus tier for many teams.
strengths.zh-TW: 對多數團隊來說，價格效益通常比 Opus 更合理。

caveats.en: Still premium-priced versus budget routing tiers.
caveats.zh-TW: 與低價 routing 層相比仍偏貴。

caveats.en: May not justify use on simple high-volume automation.
caveats.zh-TW: 在簡單高量自動化場景上未必划算。

sourceRefs.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6 VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Anthropic’s balanced Claude tier for broad production use, coding, and agent orchestration.
summary.zh-TW: Anthropic 較均衡的 Claude 層級，適合廣泛 production、coding 與 agent 編排。

description.en: Anthropic’s faster lower-cost Claude tier for lightweight production tasks.
description.zh-TW: Anthropic 速度較快、成本較低的 Claude 層級，適合輕量 production 任務。

strengths.en: Useful for faster Claude-aligned production paths.
strengths.zh-TW: 適合需要 Claude 風格但更快的 production 路徑。

strengths.en: Good step-down tier under Sonnet for routed stacks.
strengths.zh-TW: 在 routed stack 裡很適合作為 Sonnet 之下的降級層。

caveats.en: Not the best option for deep reasoning or hard coding.
caveats.zh-TW: 不是深度推理或高難度 coding 的最佳選擇。

caveats.en: Many teams will still want Sonnet for their main interactive tier.
caveats.zh-TW: 很多團隊主互動層仍會偏向 Sonnet。

sourceRefs.label: Claude Haiku 4.5 VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Anthropic’s faster lower-cost Claude tier for lightweight production tasks.
summary.zh-TW: Anthropic 速度較快、成本較低的 Claude 層級，適合輕量 production 任務。

description.en: Google’s most advanced Gemini 2.5 model for complex reasoning and coding tasks.
description.zh-TW: Google 在 Gemini 2.5 系列中最先進的模型，適合複雜推理與 coding 任務。

pricing.notes: Google lists higher rates for prompts above 200K tokens.

strengths.en: Strong multimodal reasoning with very large context.
strengths.zh-TW: 多模態推理強，且上下文很大。

strengths.en: Good fit for teams already using Google AI or Vertex AI paths.
strengths.zh-TW: 對已經在用 Google AI 或 Vertex AI 的團隊很順。

caveats.en: Google pricing becomes more complex on very long prompts and grounded calls.
caveats.zh-TW: 在超長 prompt 與 grounding 呼叫時，Google 定價會更複雜。

caveats.en: Tooling conventions differ from OpenAI and Anthropic-centered stacks.
caveats.zh-TW: 工具介面習慣與 OpenAI / Anthropic 生態不完全一致。

sourceRefs.label: Gemini 2.5 Pro VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Google’s most advanced Gemini 2.5 model for complex reasoning and coding tasks.
summary.zh-TW: Google 在 Gemini 2.5 系列中最先進的模型，適合複雜推理與 coding 任務。

description.en: Google’s price-performance Gemini 2.5 tier for low-latency, high-volume reasoning work.
description.zh-TW: Google 偏重價格效能的 Gemini 2.5 層級，適合低延遲、高吞吐的推理工作。

pricing.notes: Google lists separate audio pricing and grounding fees.

strengths.en: Attractive cost-performance profile for multimodal workloads.
strengths.zh-TW: 對多模態工作負載來說成本效能很有吸引力。

strengths.en: Useful when teams want one vendor for search-grounded and multimodal flows.
strengths.zh-TW: 適合想用單一供應商處理 grounding 與多模態流程的團隊。

caveats.en: May need careful prompt and product tuning for complex agent patterns.
caveats.zh-TW: 在複雜 agent 模式下，仍需要較細的 prompt 與產品調校。

caveats.en: Ecosystem examples are not as ubiquitous as OpenAI defaults.
caveats.zh-TW: 生態範例的普及度仍不如 OpenAI 預設路線。

sourceRefs.label: Gemini 2.5 Flash VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Google’s price-performance Gemini 2.5 tier for low-latency, high-volume reasoning work.
summary.zh-TW: Google 偏重價格效能的 Gemini 2.5 層級，適合低延遲、高吞吐的推理工作。

description.en: DeepSeek’s non-thinking API SKU mapped to the DeepSeek-V3.2 model version.
description.zh-TW: DeepSeek 的非 thinking API SKU，對應 DeepSeek-V3.2 模型版本。

pricing.notes: DeepSeek also lists lower cache-hit pricing.

strengths.en: Very aggressive API pricing for practical text workloads.
strengths.zh-TW: 在實務文字工作負載上有非常激進的 API 定價。

strengths.en: Useful as a cheaper mainline or fallback model in routed stacks.
strengths.zh-TW: 適合作為 routed stack 裡較便宜的主線或 fallback。

caveats.en: API SKU naming differs from the broader model-family branding.
caveats.zh-TW: API SKU 命名和外部模型家族品牌名稱不完全一致。

caveats.en: Some enterprises will still prefer vendors with broader compliance posture.
caveats.zh-TW: 部分企業仍可能偏好合規姿態更完整的供應商。

sourceRefs.label: deepseek-chat (DeepSeek-V3.2) VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: DeepSeek’s non-thinking API SKU mapped to the DeepSeek-V3.2 model version.
summary.zh-TW: DeepSeek 的非 thinking API SKU，對應 DeepSeek-V3.2 模型版本。

description.en: DeepSeek’s thinking API SKU mapped to the DeepSeek-V3.2 model version.
description.zh-TW: DeepSeek 的 thinking API SKU，對應 DeepSeek-V3.2 模型版本。

pricing.notes: DeepSeek lists the same published token rates with a larger reasoning-oriented output budget.

strengths.en: Keeps DeepSeek’s price profile while exposing a reasoning-oriented API tier.
strengths.zh-TW: 在維持 DeepSeek 價格優勢的同時，提供偏推理導向的 API 層。

strengths.en: Appealing for teams that need cheaper deep-thinking capacity.
strengths.zh-TW: 對需要更便宜深度思考能力的團隊很有吸引力。

caveats.en: Vendor and ecosystem maturity still trail the largest hyperscalers.
caveats.zh-TW: 供應商與生態成熟度仍落後於最大型雲端供應商。

caveats.en: Operational posture should be reviewed carefully for enterprise adoption.
caveats.zh-TW: 若要企業導入，仍應仔細檢查營運與合規姿態。

summary.en: DeepSeek’s thinking API SKU mapped to the DeepSeek-V3.2 model version.
summary.zh-TW: DeepSeek 的 thinking API SKU，對應 DeepSeek-V3.2 模型版本。

description.en: Cohere’s performant enterprise model for tool use, RAG, agents, and multilingual workflows.
description.zh-TW: Cohere 面向企業的高性能模型，適合工具使用、RAG、agent 與多語工作流。

strengths.en: Strong enterprise-facing positioning around RAG and tool use.
strengths.zh-TW: 在企業 RAG 與工具使用上定位清楚。

strengths.en: Long context helps with knowledge-heavy workflows.
strengths.zh-TW: 長上下文對知識密集型工作流有幫助。

caveats.en: Ecosystem mindshare is smaller than OpenAI or Anthropic.
caveats.zh-TW: 生態心智份額小於 OpenAI 與 Anthropic。

caveats.en: Some teams may prefer more standardized agent examples elsewhere.
caveats.zh-TW: 部分團隊可能更偏好其他生態較標準化的 agent 範例。

sourceRefs.label: Command A VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Cohere’s performant enterprise model for tool use, RAG, agents, and multilingual workflows.
summary.zh-TW: Cohere 面向企業的高性能模型，適合工具使用、RAG、agent 與多語工作流。

description.en: Cohere’s reasoning-oriented Command tier for complex agentic enterprise workflows.
description.zh-TW: Cohere 偏 reasoning 的 Command 層，適合複雜 agent 企業工作流。

pricing.notes: Official docs state Command A Reasoning is free for trial and production keys until rate limits are reached.

strengths.en: Reasoning-focused variant with strong enterprise task framing.
strengths.zh-TW: 推理導向的變體，且企業任務定位明確。

strengths.en: The official free-access positioning lowers experimentation risk.
strengths.zh-TW: 官方提供的免費使用定位，降低了試驗成本。

caveats.en: Published pricing posture is unusual and may change.
caveats.zh-TW: 官方目前的定價姿態較特殊，後續可能變動。

caveats.en: Teams should verify production access expectations before committing.
caveats.zh-TW: 在正式投入前，仍應先確認 production 存取條件。

sourceRefs.label: Command A Reasoning VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Cohere’s reasoning-oriented Command tier for complex agentic enterprise workflows.
summary.zh-TW: Cohere 偏 reasoning 的 Command 層，適合複雜 agent 企業工作流。

description.en: Cohere’s smallest and fastest R-family enterprise model.
description.zh-TW: Cohere R 系列中最小、最快的企業模型。

strengths.en: Very compelling price and latency profile.
strengths.zh-TW: 價格與延遲表現都很有吸引力。

strengths.en: Good choice for enterprise assistants that do not need frontier depth.
strengths.zh-TW: 對不需要前沿深度的企業助理來說是好選擇。

caveats.en: Capability ceiling is lower than larger premium models.
caveats.zh-TW: 能力上限低於更大的高階模型。

caveats.en: Best used where efficiency matters more than nuance.
caveats.zh-TW: 更適合效率優先、而不是細膩理解優先的場景。

sourceRefs.label: Command R7B VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Cohere’s smallest and fastest R-family enterprise model.
summary.zh-TW: Cohere R 系列中最小、最快的企業模型。

description.en: Perplexity’s lightweight search model for quick grounded answers with real-time web search.
description.zh-TW: Perplexity 輕量級搜尋模型，適合快速且有即時網頁依據的回答。

pricing.notes: Perplexity also charges request fees by search context size.

strengths.en: Fast grounded answers are the core product strength.
strengths.zh-TW: 快速且有根據的回答是核心優勢。

strengths.en: Good for teams that care more about answer freshness than raw frontier reasoning.
strengths.zh-TW: 適合更重視資訊新鮮度，而非純前沿推理的團隊。

caveats.en: This is a search-native product tier, not a general-purpose long-context flagship.
caveats.zh-TW: 這是 search-native 產品層，不是通用長上下文旗艦模型。

caveats.en: Request-fee economics should be reviewed alongside token prices.
caveats.zh-TW: 除了 token 價格，也要一併檢查 request fee。

sourceRefs.label: Sonar VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Perplexity’s lightweight search model for quick grounded answers with real-time web search.
summary.zh-TW: Perplexity 輕量級搜尋模型，適合快速且有即時網頁依據的回答。

description.en: Perplexity’s advanced search model with deeper content understanding and enhanced search accuracy.
description.zh-TW: Perplexity 進階搜尋模型，提供更深內容理解與更高搜尋準確度。

pricing.notes: Request fees vary by search context size and Pro Search mode.

strengths.en: Better fit for more complex search-heavy questions than base Sonar.
strengths.zh-TW: 比基礎 Sonar 更適合複雜的搜尋導向問題。

strengths.en: Good middle tier for research stacks that need freshness and depth.
strengths.zh-TW: 對需要兼顧資訊新鮮度與深度的 research stack 來說很適中。

caveats.en: Pricing jumps meaningfully over base Sonar.
caveats.zh-TW: 價格相較基礎 Sonar 有明顯提升。

caveats.en: Still a search-native product rather than a broad general foundation model.
caveats.zh-TW: 本質上仍是 search-native 產品，而不是廣義基礎模型。

sourceRefs.label: Sonar Pro VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Perplexity’s advanced search model with deeper content understanding and enhanced search accuracy.
summary.zh-TW: Perplexity 進階搜尋模型，提供更深內容理解與更高搜尋準確度。

description.en: Perplexity’s reasoning-enhanced search model for harder grounded questions.
description.zh-TW: Perplexity 強化 reasoning 的搜尋模型，適合較難且需要 grounding 的問題。

pricing.notes: Request fees vary by search context size.

strengths.en: Better fit when grounded research also needs explicit reasoning.
strengths.zh-TW: 當 grounded research 同時需要更明確推理時會更有優勢。

strengths.en: Price sits below Sonar Pro on token costs.
strengths.zh-TW: token 成本低於 Sonar Pro。

caveats.en: Still inherits search-context pricing complexity.
caveats.zh-TW: 仍然承接 search-context 的定價複雜性。

caveats.en: Not positioned as a universal coding or automation default.
caveats.zh-TW: 不是通用 coding 或 automation 的預設選項。

sourceRefs.label: Sonar Reasoning Pro VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Perplexity’s reasoning-enhanced search model for harder grounded questions.
summary.zh-TW: Perplexity 強化 reasoning 的搜尋模型，適合較難且需要 grounding 的問題。

description.en: Perplexity’s deepest research tier with citation and search-query pricing components.
description.zh-TW: Perplexity 最深度的研究層，包含 citation 與 search-query 定價元件。

pricing.notes: Perplexity also charges citation tokens, reasoning tokens, and search-query fees.

strengths.en: Built specifically for deeper research and citation-heavy output.
strengths.zh-TW: 就是為更深入研究與 citation 密集輸出而設計。

strengths.en: Makes source-backed reporting more explicit than generic chat models.
strengths.zh-TW: 比一般聊天模型更明確地支援來源導向報告。

caveats.en: The pricing model has multiple moving parts and needs careful review.
caveats.zh-TW: 定價模型有多個元件，必須仔細檢查。

caveats.en: Latency and cost profile are less suitable for lightweight interactive use.
caveats.zh-TW: 延遲與成本輪廓不太適合輕量互動場景。

sourceRefs.label: Sonar Deep Research VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Perplexity’s deepest research tier with citation and search-query pricing components.
summary.zh-TW: Perplexity 最深度的研究層，包含 citation 與 search-query 定價元件。

description.en: Mistral’s open-weight multimodal flagship with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture.
description.zh-TW: Mistral 的 open-weight 多模態旗艦模型，採用 Mixture-of-Experts 架構。

strengths.en: Open-weight positioning makes it strategically interesting for some teams.
strengths.zh-TW: open-weight 定位對部分團隊很有策略吸引力。

strengths.en: Price-performance looks strong relative to many premium closed models.
strengths.zh-TW: 相對不少高價封閉模型，價格效能很不錯。

caveats.en: Tooling ecosystem is still smaller than the biggest US vendors.
caveats.zh-TW: 工具生態仍小於最大的美系供應商。

caveats.en: Teams should validate downstream hosting and maintenance assumptions.
caveats.zh-TW: 若要落地，仍應確認後續 hosting 與維運假設。

sourceRefs.label: Mistral Large 3 VerdictLens review
sourceRefs.notes: Editorial shortlist guidance is intentionally separated from official provider facts.

summary.en: Mistral’s open-weight multimodal flagship with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture.
summary.zh-TW: Mistral 的 open-weight 多模態旗艦模型，採用 Mixture-of-Experts 架構。

description.en: Mistral’s mid-tier enterprise model with strong function calling and agent-oriented features.
description.zh-TW: Mistral 中階企業模型，具備不錯的 function calling 與 agent 導向功能。

strengths.en: Looks like a practical middle tier for cost-aware teams.
strengths.zh-TW: 看起來很像成本敏感團隊可用的實務中階層。

strengths.en: Official docs expose agent and structured-output features clearly.
strengths.zh-TW: 官方文件對 agent 與 structured output 功能描述清楚。

caveats.en: Less ecosystem gravity than the biggest model platforms.
caveats.zh-TW: 生態引力仍低於最大模型平台。

caveats.en: Teams should test model behavior carefully on their own evals.
caveats.zh-TW: 仍應在自家 eval 上仔細測試模型行為。

summary.zh-TW: Mistral 中階企業模型，具備不錯的 function calling 與 agent 導向功能。

description.en: Mistral’s lower-cost small model for efficient production use.
description.zh-TW: Mistral 較低成本的小模型，適合高效率 production 使用。

strengths.en: Strong efficiency tier inside the Mistral stack.
strengths.zh-TW: 在 Mistral stack 裡是很強的效率層。

strengths.en: Good candidate for routing, extraction, and lighter assistants.
strengths.zh-TW: 適合 routing、擷取與較輕量助理。

caveats.en: Limited headroom for advanced reasoning.
caveats.zh-TW: 進階推理的能力空間有限。

caveats.en: Best used with escalation paths to larger models.
caveats.zh-TW: 最好搭配升級到更大模型的路徑。
